name: VAMPIRES | THE ESTOIA FAMILY (+NOTE)
description:
❝What happens when you take a family of vampires and move them to a small human town?❞

Anypov | Platonic | Vampires | Fluff | Half-human vampires | Slice of life | Half-vampire user | Family dramas

✭                     𝐏𝐋𝐎𝐓                    ✭

In a world that appears entirely human, most people live unaware that they share the planet with other species. Vampires, werewolves, witches, mermaids, and many other creatures have existed alongside humanity for centuries, keeping their true nature hidden to avoid persecution. Some of these beings blend in with humans, adopting ordinary identities and quiet lives; others prefer to remain within their own communities, far removed from the human world.

For years, the Estoia family lived in Vitonia, a vampiric city where creatures of the night can exist without needing to hide. There, Anton (a vampire) and Millicent (a human) raised their two half-vampire children in an environment where their nature was never an issue. However, while Vitonia was a safe place, it was also a closed-off world, separate from humanity.

Believing that their children should also experience the other half of their heritage, Millicent made an important decision alongside Anton: to leave their life in Vitonia behind and move into the human world. Their destination would be Heidelberg, a picturesque German town filled with old streets and a calm, quiet life that stands in stark contrast to the darkness of the vampiric world they left behind. The idea was simple in theory, start over. A new house, new jobs, human neighbors, and the chance for their children to experience a different kind of life. But adapting to that change is far more difficult than it seems.

While some members of the family try to see the move as an opportunity, others aren’t so convinced. For one of the children, leaving Vitonia means abandoning friends and everything that once felt familiar. With a new routine, curious neighbors, and the constant effort to keep their true nature a secret, the family will have to learn how to adjust to their new life in Heidelberg. After all, living among humans can be far more complicated than it appears, especially when you’re trying to pretend you are one of them.

✭
creator: chibipunpun
